patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Roboto, Roboto Mono, Roboto Flex.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: initials, src, size, style.
<Avatar> size must be one of 's' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: count, style.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, icon, disabled, onClick, children, style.
<Button> variant must be one of 'elevated' | 'filled' | 'tonal' | 'outlined' | 'text'.
<Button> size must be one of 'xs' | 's' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl'.
<ButtonGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: connected, children, style.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, onClick, children, style.
<Card> variant must be one of 'elevated' | 'filled' | 'outlined'.
<CarouselItemDef> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: image, label.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, indeterminate, disabled, onChange, style.
<Chip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, selected, disabled, icon, onClick, onRemove, children, style.
<Chip> variant must be one of 'assist' | 'filter' | 'input' | 'suggestion'.
<DatePicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: year, month, selectedDay, onSelect, style.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, title, children, actions, onClose, style.
<Divider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: inset, vertical, style.
<Fab> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, color, extended, label, onClick, children, style.
<Fab> size must be one of 's' | 'm' | 'l'.
<Fab> color must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'surface'.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, selected, disabled, onClick, children, style.
<IconButton> variant must be one of 'standard' | 'filled' | 'tonal' | 'outlined'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'xs' | 's' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl'.
<ListItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: leading, headline, supporting, trailing, onClick, style.
<MenuItemDef> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, icon, onClick.
<NavItemDef> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, icon.
<NavItemDef2> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, icon.
<ProgressIndicator> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, value, style.
<ProgressIndicator> variant must be one of 'linear' | 'circular'.
<RadioButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: selected, disabled, onChange, style.
<SearchBar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: placeholder, value, leading, trailing, onChange, style.
<SegmentDef> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value.
<Sheet> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, variant, children, onClose, style.
<Sheet> variant must be one of 'bottom' | 'side'.
<Slider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, min, max, disabled, onChange, style.
<Snackbar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: message, actionLabel, onAction, style.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, disabled, onChange, style.
<TocItemDef> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, level.
<TabDef> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, icon.
<TextField> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, label, value, placeholder, error, disabled, supportingText, onChange, style.
<TextField> variant must be one of 'outlined' | 'filled'.
<TimePicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: hour, minute, onChange, style.
<Toolbar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: floating, children, style.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: text, children, style.
<TopAppBar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, title, leading, trailing, style.
<TopAppBar> variant must be one of 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.
